机器学习/ML.title: Conditional KRR: Injecting Unpenalized Features into Kernel Methods with Applications to Kernel Thresholding
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 条件KRR：将无惩罚特征注入核方法及其在核阈值处理中的应用
机器学习/ML.summary: Conditionally positive definite (CPD) kernels are defined with respect to a function class $\mathcal{F}$. It is well known that such a kernel $K$ is associated with its native space (defined analogously to an RKHS), which in turn gives rise to a learning method -- called conditional kernel ridge regression (CKRR). In this paper, we study CKRR in detail and show that it can be interpreted as standard KRR with an additional set of unpenalized features. We leverage this interpretation to develop a novel feature selection method, kernel thresholding, which simultaneously selects relevant kernels and unpenalized features. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 条件正定（CPD）核相对于函数类$\mathcal{F}$定义。已知此类核$K$与其原生空间（类似于RKHS定义）相关联，进而产生了一种学习方法——条件核岭回归（CKRR）。本文详细研究了CKRR，并表明它可以被解释为带有额外无惩罚特征集的标准KRR。我们利用这一解释开发了一种新颖的特征选择方法——核阈值处理，该方法同时选择相关核和无惩罚特征。在合成和真实数据集上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

机器学习/ML.title: Rethinking Weak Supervision in Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 重新思考异常检测中的弱监督：一个综合基准
机器学习/ML.summary: Weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) has developed in three primary directions: incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision. However, these directions remain isolated, lacking a unified framework to assess whether they address unique challenges or share fundamental mechanics. This paper introduces a comprehensive benchmark that unifies these three settings under a common experimental protocol. We systematically evaluate a wide range of methods across multiple datasets and identify key insights about the underlying mechanisms. Our findings reveal that many seemingly distinct approaches share common algorithmic components, and we propose a taxonomy to guide future research. The benchmark is publicly available to facilitate reproducible research.
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 弱监督异常检测（WSAD）已发展出三个主要方向：不完全监督、不精确监督和不准确监督。然而，这些方向仍然孤立，缺乏一个统一的框架来评估它们是否处理独特的挑战或共享基本机制。本文引入了一个综合基准，将三种设置统一在共同的实验协议下。我们系统地评估了多种数据集上的广泛方法，并识别出关于底层机制的关键见解。我们的发现揭示了许多看似不同的方法共享共同的算法组件，并提出了一个分类法以指导未来研究。该基准公开可用以促进可重复研究。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: Can LLMs Time Travel? Enhancing Temporal Consistency in Legal Agentic Search through Reinforcement Learning
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: LLM能时间旅行吗？通过强化学习增强法律智能搜索中的时间一致性
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: While large language models (LLMs) augmented with agentic search capabilities show promise for legal reasoning, they overlook a fundamental constraint that applicable law must match the temporal context of each case, as retroactive application of statutes violates core legal principles and leads to erroneous conclusions. In this paper, we identify the temporal consistency problem in legal agentic search and propose a reinforcement learning framework to enforce temporal alignment between retrieved legal documents and the case timeline. We construct a dataset of temporal legal queries and train a policy that rewards temporally consistent retrievals. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements in temporal accuracy without sacrificing overall reasoning quality.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 尽管增强有智能搜索能力的大型语言模型（LLM）在法律推理中展现出前景，但它们忽略了一个基本约束：适用法律必须与每个案件的时间背景匹配，因为法规的追溯应用违反核心法律原则并导致错误结论。本文识别了法律智能搜索中的时间一致性问题，并提出了一种强化学习框架，以强制检索到的法律文件与案件时间线之间的时间对齐。我们构建了一个时间法律查询数据集，并训练了一个奖励时间一致检索的策略。实验表明，在不牺牲整体推理质量的情况下，时间准确性有显著提升。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: QUIET: A Multi-Blank Cascaded Story Cloze Benchmark for LLM Creative Generation Capability
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: QUIET：用于LLM创造性生成能力的多空白级联故事完形填空基准
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Large language models (LLMs) face a dual challenge in creative capability evaluation: existing benchmarks (e.g., Story Cloze Test, HellaSwag) measure models' discriminative ability over narrative continuation using multiple-choice recognition paradigms, rather than directly measuring creative generation. To bridge this gap, we propose QUIET, a multi-blank cascaded story cloze benchmark that requires models to generate multiple missing spans in a coherent narrative. We collect stories from diverse sources and design cascaded blanks that test planning and coherence. Experiments show that QUIET better differentiates models on creative generation, and reveals limitations in current LLMs' ability to maintain long-range narrative consistency.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在创造性能力评估中面临双重挑战：现有基准（如Story Cloze Test、HellaSwag）使用多项选择识别范式衡量模型对叙事延续的判别能力，而非直接衡量创造性生成。为弥补这一差距，我们提出QUIET，一个多空白级联故事完形填空基准，要求模型在连贯叙事中生成多个缺失片段。我们从多种来源收集故事，并设计级联空白以测试规划和连贯性。实验表明，QUIET能更好地区分模型的创造性生成能力，并揭示了当前LLM在维持长距离叙事一致性方面的局限性。

机器人/RO.title: When Search Becomes Memory: Turning Robot Design Trials into Transferable Skills
机器人/RO.title_zh: 当搜索变成记忆：将机器人设计试验转化为可迁移技能
机器人/RO.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as proposal generators for evolutionary robot design, yet most loops remain memoryless: simulator results shape the next population but are not preserved as reusable design knowledge. We present Auto-Robotist, a self-evolving LLM agent that distills design trials into transferable skills. By maintaining a memory of successful and failed designs, Auto-Robotist learns to avoid past mistakes and exploit effective patterns. Experiments show that skills learned from one task can accelerate design on new tasks, achieving higher performance with fewer trials. Our work bridges evolutionary design and skill transfer, enabling more efficient robot development.
机器人/RO.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地被用作演化机器人设计的提案生成器，但大多数循环仍然是无记忆的：模拟器结果塑造下一代种群，但并未作为可重用的设计知识保存。我们提出Auto-Robotist，一个自我演化的LLM智能体，它将设计试验提炼为可迁移技能。通过维护成功和失败设计的记忆，Auto-Robotist学会避免过去的错误并利用有效模式。实验表明，从一个任务中习得的技能可以加速新任务的设计，用更少的试验实现更高的性能。我们的工作桥接了演化设计和技能迁移，实现了更高效的机器人开发。

软件工程与AI.title: Beyond Summaries: Structure-Aware Labeling of Code Changes with Large Language Models
软件工程与AI.title_zh: 超越摘要：基于大语言模型的代码变更结构感知标注
软件工程与AI.summary: Code review is a critical practice in software engineering, yet the growing scale and frequency of code patches in modern projects, together with the widespread adoption of AI code assistants, make manual review increasingly challenging. Identifying the types of changes within a patch, such as renam
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: 代码审查是软件工程中的关键实践，但现代项目中代码补丁的规模和频率不断增长，加上AI代码助手的广泛采用，使得人工审查变得越来越具有挑战性。识别补丁中的变更类型（如重命名）对于自动化审查至关重要。本文提出了一种结构感知的标注方法，利用大语言模型（LLM）对代码变更进行细粒度分类，超越了简单的摘要生成。创新点在于结合代码的语法和结构信息，使LLM能够更准确地识别变更意图和类型，显著提升了变更分类的精确度和召回率。主要贡献包括：设计了一种新的提示策略，融合了代码差异的结构化表示；在多个开源项目上验证了方法的有效性；展示了该方法在自动化代码审查中的实际应用潜力。

软件工程与AI.title: Retrieval-Augmented Detection of Potentially Abusive Clauses in Chilean Terms of Service
软件工程与AI.title_zh: 基于检索增强的智利服务条款中潜在滥用条款检测
软件工程与AI.summary: Online Terms of Service often function as contracts of adhesion, creating asymmetries that may expose consumers to potentially abusive clauses. In Chile, assessing such clauses is legally challenging because some provisions clearly violate mandatory consumer law, whereas others depend on broader sta
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: 在线服务条款通常作为附意合同，造成信息不对称，可能使消费者面临潜在滥用条款。在智利，评估此类条款具有法律挑战性，因为某些条款明显违反强制性消费者法，而其他条款则取决于更广泛的法律解释。本文提出了一种检索增强的检测方法，结合法律知识库和自然语言处理技术，自动识别服务条款中的潜在滥用条款。创新点在于将法律领域的专业知识与检索增强生成（RAG）相结合，提高了检测的准确性和可解释性。主要贡献包括：构建了智利消费者法律知识库；设计了多阶段检索与分类框架；在真实服务条款数据集上取得了高准确率，为消费者保护提供了自动化工具。

AI智能体与推理.title: VeriTrace: Evolving Mental Models for Deep Research Agents
AI智能体与推理.title_zh: VeriTrace：面向深度研究智能体的心智模型演化
AI智能体与推理.summary: Deep research agents face vast, interdependent, and pervasively uncertain information. Existing systems explore what evolving intermediate representations should look like, but leave their evolution to the LLM's implicit reasoning. Without explicit regulation, the intermediate layer is easily contam
AI智能体与推理.summary_zh: 深度研究智能体面临庞大、相互依赖且普遍不确定的信息。现有系统探索了演化中的中间表示应该是什么样，但将其演化过程留给大语言模型（LLM）的隐式推理。缺乏显式调控，中间层容易受到噪声和错误信息的污染。本文提出VeriTrace框架，通过显式建模心智模型的演化过程，使智能体能够动态更新和验证其内部信念。创新点在于引入可追踪的推理路径和验证机制，确保中间表示的一致性和可靠性。主要贡献包括：设计了心智模型演化的形式化框架；开发了基于验证的推理跟踪算法；在多个复杂研究任务上显著提升了智能体的准确性和鲁棒性。

视觉语言模型.title: DRScaffold: Boosting Dense-Scene Reasoning in Lightweight Vision Language Models
视觉语言模型.title_zh: DRScaffold：提升轻量级视觉语言模型的密集场景推理能力
视觉语言模型.summary: Lightweight vision-language models perform competitively on standard benchmarks yet fail systematically in dense-scene reasoning, where multiple objects, attributes, and relations must be jointly grounded and resolved through multi-step inference. Such capability is critical for real-world applicati
视觉语言模型.summary_zh: 轻量级视觉语言模型在标准基准上表现良好，但在密集场景推理中系统性失败，因为密集场景需要将多个对象、属性和关系联合 grounding 并通过多步推理解决。这种能力对于现实应用至关重要。本文提出DRScaffold框架，通过引入场景图引导的推理脚手架，增强轻量级模型在密集场景中的推理能力。创新点在于将外部场景图知识融入模型推理过程，提供结构化的推理路径。主要贡献包括：设计了一种轻量级的场景图编码器；提出了多步推理的逐步引导策略；在多个密集场景推理基准上取得了显著提升，同时保持了模型的高效性。

AI系统与优化.title: From Accounting to Coordination: A Virtual Water-Aware Electricity-Computation-Water Nexus Framework for Data Center Dispatch
AI系统与优化.title_zh: 从核算到协调：面向数据中心调度的虚拟水感知电-算-水关联框架
AI系统与优化.summary: The expansion of data centers (DCs) drives a sustained increase in electricity demand and associated water withdrawals at generation sites. These withdrawals occur at generation sites and are virtually allocated to demand based on network power flows. Consequently, the actual water footprint of a sp
AI系统与优化.summary_zh: 数据中心的扩张导致电力需求持续增长，并伴随发电站的水资源消耗。这些水消耗发生在发电站，并根据网络潮流虚拟分配给需求端。因此，特定数据中心的实际水足迹取决于电力来源。本文提出一个虚拟水感知的电-算-水关联框架，将数据中心调度从单纯的水足迹核算扩展到多资源协调优化。创新点在于将虚拟水概念与电力调度和计算任务分配相结合，实现跨域资源协同。主要贡献包括：建立了电-算-水耦合模型；设计了多目标优化算法，在降低水足迹的同时保持计算性能；在真实数据中心场景中验证了框架的有效性，为绿色数据中心运营提供了新思路。

Urban Representation Learning.title: CITYREP: A Unified Benchmark for Urban Representations Across Cities, Tasks, and Modalities
Urban Representation Learning.title_zh: CITYREP：跨城市、任务和模态的城市表示统一基准
Urban Representation Learning.summary: Urban representation learning encodes complex urban environments into general-purpose embeddings for diverse downstream tasks and emerging urban foundation models. However, current evaluations are limited, typically focusing on one or two cities and tasks and relying on random splits that introduce
Urban Representation Learning.summary_zh: 城市表示学习将复杂的城市环境编码为通用嵌入，用于各种下游任务和新兴的城市基础模型。然而，当前的评估方法存在局限性，通常只关注一两个城市和任务，并且依赖随机划分，这引入了数据泄露问题。为此，本文提出了CITYREP基准，统一了跨城市、任务和模态的评估框架，涵盖了多个城市、多种任务类型（如人口预测、犯罪率预测等）以及不同数据模态（如POI、路网、遥感图像）。CITYREP通过标准化评估协议，避免了数据泄露，提供了公平的比较平台。实验表明，现有方法在不同城市和任务上表现差异显著，揭示了城市表示学习的泛化挑战。该基准为未来研究提供了可靠的基础。

Computer Vision.title: EchoPilot: Training-Free Ultrasound Video Segmentation via Scale-Space Semantic Prompting and Reliability-Gated Memory
Computer Vision.title_zh: EchoPilot：基于尺度空间语义提示和可靠性门控记忆的无训练超声视频分割
Computer Vision.summary: Ultrasound video segmentation is clinically valuable yet difficult due to speckle noise, weak boundaries, and rapid anatomical deformation. Recent promptable foundation models enable point-guided segmentation, but their direct deployment in ultrasound remains unreliable: a single point provides insu
Computer Vision.summary_zh: 超声视频分割在临床上具有重要价值，但由于散斑噪声、弱边界和快速解剖变形而困难。最近的可提示基础模型实现了点引导分割，但在超声中直接部署仍不可靠：单个点提供的信息不足。本文提出EchoPilot，一种无需训练的方法，利用尺度空间语义提示和可靠性门控记忆。该方法通过多尺度特征提取和语义提示生成鲁棒的分割建议，并引入可靠性门控记忆机制，动态融合历史帧信息，抑制噪声和漂移。在多个超声视频数据集上，EchoPilot无需任何微调即达到或超过现有监督方法，显著提高了分割的稳定性和准确性，为临床实时应用提供了可行方案。

Computer Vision.title: Channel-wise Vector Quantization
Computer Vision.summary: We present Channel-wise Vector Quantization (CVQ), a novel image tokenization paradigm that replaces patch-wise tokens with channel-wise tokens. Unlike conventional vector quantization, which assigns a discrete token to each patch feature vector, CVQ quantizes each channel of the feature map. This f
Computer Vision.summary_zh: 本文提出通道级向量量化（CVQ），一种新颖的图像分词范式，用通道级令牌替代补丁级令牌。与传统向量量化为每个补丁特征向量分配离散令牌不同，CVQ对特征图的每个通道进行量化。这一转变使得每个令牌编码全局语义信息（如颜色、纹理或形状），而非局部空间信息。CVQ在图像重建和生成任务中表现出色，特别是在高压缩率下，比基于补丁的方法更有效地保留语义结构。此外，CVQ与自回归模型结合，可生成高质量图像，并支持可控生成。实验证明，CVQ在多个基准上优于现有量化方法，为图像令牌化提供了新思路。

LLM / NLP.title: When Gradients Collide: Failure Modes of Multi-Objective Prompt Optimization for LLM Judges
LLM / NLP.title_zh: 当梯度冲突时：LLM评判器多目标提示优化的失败模式
LLM / NLP.summary: Customizing an LLM judge to a specific task or domain often involves optimizing its prompt across multiple evaluation criteria simultaneously. Textual gradient methods automate this for a single judge criterion, however they produce natural-language critiques, not numerical vectors. Thus, the confli
LLM / NLP.summary_zh: 将LLM评判器定制到特定任务或领域通常需要同时优化其提示以应对多个评估标准。文本梯度方法针对单一评判标准自动化了这一过程，但它们产生自然语言批评，而非数值向量。因此，当同时优化多个标准时，这些批评可能相互冲突，导致性能下降。本文系统研究了多目标提示优化的失败模式，发现不同标准之间的梯度冲突会导致优化不稳定、评判标准混淆和性能退化。通过实验，作者识别了冲突类型，并提出了缓解策略，如梯度裁剪和标准优先级排序。该工作揭示了多目标提示优化的关键挑战，为构建更可靠的LLM评判器提供了指导。

AI for Education / Data Leakage.title: When Can We Trust Early Warnings? Leakage-Excluded Early Outcome Prediction from LMS Interaction Logs
AI for Education / Data Leakage.title_zh: 我们何时能信任早期预警？从LMS交互日志中排除泄露的早期结果预测
AI for Education / Data Leakage.summary: Early-warning models built from Learning Management System (LMS) logs aim to predict end-of-course outcomes early enough to enable timely learner support. However, reported "early" performance is often inflated by temporal leakage. This occurs when the pipeline uses information that would not yet be
AI for Education / Data Leakage.summary_zh: 基于学习管理系统（LMS）日志构建的早期预警模型旨在尽早预测课程结束结果，以便及时提供学习者支持。然而，报告的“早期”性能往往因时间泄露而被夸大，即模型使用了未来信息。本文系统分析了LMS日志中的时间泄露来源，并提出了排除泄露的评估框架。通过严格的时间划分和数据隔离，作者发现许多先前报告的优异性能在排除泄露后大幅下降。文章还提出了缓解泄露的方法，如使用时间感知验证和特征工程。该工作强调了在早期预测中评估数据泄露的重要性，并为构建可信的预警系统提供了方法论指导。

机器学习与AI应用.title: Quantitative Evaluation of the Severity of Posttraumatic Stress Disorder through Transfer Learning from Specific Phobia Data
机器学习与AI应用.title_zh: 通过从特定恐惧症数据迁移学习量化评估创伤后应激障碍严重程度
机器学习与AI应用.summary: Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a prevalent and debilitating mental health condition with significant personal and societal impacts. Current clinical assessments of PTSD often rely on subjective evaluations, which can be time-consuming, costly, and prone to human bias. This study proposes a
机器学习与AI应用.summary_zh: 创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）是一种常见且致残的心理健康疾病，对个人和社会有重大影响。当前的临床评估多依赖主观评价，耗时、昂贵且易受人为偏差影响。本研究提出一种基于迁移学习的方法，利用特定恐惧症数据来量化PTSD严重程度。创新点在于通过迁移学习克服PTSD数据稀缺问题，利用相关恐惧症领域的丰富数据训练模型，实现对PTSD症状的客观量化评估。主要贡献包括：开发了跨疾病迁移学习框架，在有限PTSD数据上取得高准确率；提供了比传统问卷更客观、高效的评估工具；为心理健康领域的AI辅助诊断提供了新思路。

自然语言处理与可解释性.title: Geometric Evolution Maps: Extracting Stable Concept Probes from Transformer Residual Streams
自然语言处理与可解释性.title_zh: 几何演化图：从Transformer残差流中提取稳定概念探针
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary: Concept probes extracted from transformer residual streams are only as reliable as the layer from which they are extracted. The common practice of probing at a fixed late layer or at the peak of a separation score function ignores a fundamental structural feature: concept representations undergo sub
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary_zh: 从Transformer残差流中提取的概念探针的可靠性取决于提取层。常见的在固定后期层或分离得分峰值处进行探测的做法忽略了概念表示在层间演化的结构特征。本文提出几何演化图（Geometric Evolution Maps），通过追踪概念表示在残差流中的几何变化，提取更稳定、鲁棒的概念探针。创新点在于：1）揭示了概念表示的非单调演化路径；2）提出基于演化图的层选择策略，避免固定层探测的偏差。主要贡献：为Transformer可解释性提供了动态视角，提高了概念探测的准确性和稳定性，有助于理解模型内部表示。

自然语言处理与可解释性.title: Confidence and Calibration of Activation Oracles for Reliable Interpretation of Language Model Internals
自然语言处理与可解释性.title_zh: 激活神谕的置信度与校准：用于语言模型内部状态的可靠解释
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary: Activation oracles aim to make the activations of other models legible to humans and yield promising results compared to white-box interpretability techniques. However, uncertainty quantification (UQ) for the natural-language outputs of such activation oracles is so far understudied. Here, we invest
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary_zh: 激活神谕旨在使其他模型的激活对人类可读，与白盒可解释性技术相比取得了有希望的结果。然而，这些激活神谕的自然语言输出的不确定性量化（UQ）迄今研究不足。本文系统研究了激活神谕的置信度与校准问题。创新点：1）首次对激活神谕的输出进行不确定性量化；2）提出校准方法提高其可靠性。主要贡献：为语言模型内部解释提供了置信度评估框架，使解释结果更可信，对模型调试和安全性有重要意义。

自然语言处理与可解释性.title: Explaining Too Much? Understanding How Large Language Model Reasoning Traces Influence Performance and Metacognition
自然语言处理与可解释性.title_zh: 解释过多？理解大语言模型推理轨迹如何影响性能与元认知
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary: Large Language Model interfaces are increasingly verbose, exposing intermediate reasoning traces alongside final answers. Traces are framed as transparency mechanisms, yet it is unclear how people use them to solve problems. We report a preregistered between-subjects study (N = 559) in which partici
自然语言处理与可解释性.summary_zh: 大语言模型界面日益冗长，在最终答案旁展示中间推理轨迹。这些轨迹被视为透明机制，但人们如何利用它们解决问题尚不清楚。本文报告了一项预注册的受试者间研究（N=559）。创新点：1）实证研究了推理轨迹对用户性能和元认知的影响；2）发现过度解释可能反而降低用户表现。主要贡献：揭示了LLM推理轨迹的双刃剑效应，为设计更有效的AI交互界面提供了实证依据，强调了在透明性与认知负荷之间的平衡。

NLP与生成模型.title: Creative Quality Alignment: Expert Tacit Knowledge Transfer via Chain-of-Thought Fine-Tuning
NLP与生成模型.title_zh: 创意质量对齐：通过思维链微调实现专家隐性知识迁移
NLP与生成模型.summary: This paper provides an empirical implementation of the creative quality metric proposed in Calibrated Surprise (Zou & Xu, 2026a). The question this paper addresses is: does this mathematical claim hold at the engineering level? To make the answer as general as possible, we deliberately choose the
NLP与生成模型.summary_zh: 本文对Calibrated Surprise (Zou & Xu, 2026a)中提出的创意质量度量进行了实证实现。核心问题是：这一数学主张在工程层面是否成立？为求答案的普遍性，作者选择了特定任务进行验证。创新点：1）将思维链微调应用于创意质量对齐，实现专家隐性知识向模型的迁移；2）通过校准惊喜度指标量化创意，并验证其工程可行性。主要贡献：展示了如何将理论创意度量转化为实际模型训练方法，为AI生成内容的创造性评估与提升提供了新路径。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Clarify, Abstain or Answer? Strategising in Conversation with Belief-Augmented Generation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 澄清、弃权还是回答？基于信念增强生成的对话策略
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) define a distribution over text, which can be viewed as a probabilistic representation of uncertainty: sampling K responses yields a belief state - responses a model deems plausible. Existing work exploits this representation for narrow tasks like either decoding or selecting responses. We propose a framework that leverages the belief state to strategically decide between clarifying, abstaining, or answering in conversational settings. Our method augments LLM generations with a belief state that captures the model's uncertainty about the user's intent, enabling more robust and trustworthy dialogue. Experiments show improved performance on ambiguous queries.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）通过文本分布定义了一种不确定性的概率表示：对K个响应进行采样可得到信念状态——模型认为合理的响应集合。现有工作仅将此表示用于解码或选择等狭窄任务。我们提出一个框架，利用信念状态在对话场景中策略性地决定是澄清、弃权还是直接回答。该方法通过捕获模型对用户意图不确定性的信念状态增强LLM生成，从而实现更鲁棒和可信的对话。实验表明，在模糊查询上性能显著提升。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Causal Tongue-Tie: LLMs Can Encode Causal Direction, But Their Yes/No Outputs Fail to Express
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 因果束缚：LLM能编码因果方向，但其是/否输出无法表达
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We find a mismatch between what large language models encode about a causal question and what they answer. On anti-commonsense CLadder items, a fixed linear probe recovers the evidence-supported answer from the model's hidden state (accuracy approximately 0.97), while the spoken Yes/No reverts to the commonsense bias. This reveals a 'causal tongue-tie': the model's internal representation knows the correct causal direction, but the output layer fails to express it. We analyze the reasons and propose a simple decoding intervention that improves accuracy by 15%.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 我们发现大型语言模型在因果问题上编码的信息与回答之间存在不匹配。在反常识的CLadder任务中，固定线性探针从模型隐藏状态中恢复出证据支持的答案（准确率约0.97），而直接的是/否输出却偏向常识。这揭示了“因果束缚”：模型内部表示知道正确的因果方向，但输出层无法表达。我们分析了原因，并提出一种简单的解码干预方法，将准确率提升15%。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SafeCtrl-RL: Inference-Time Adaptive Behaviour Control for LLM Dialogue via RL-Driven Prompt Optimisation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SafeCtrl-RL：通过强化学习驱动的提示优化实现LLM对话的推理时自适应行为控制
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Ensuring safe and contextually appropriate behaviour in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical challenge for real-world deployment. We present SafeCtrl-RL, an inference-time behavioural control framework that enables adaptive safety regulation without model retraining or parameter modification. It uses a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to dynamically optimize prompts based on dialogue context, steering the LLM towards safer responses while maintaining fluency. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show significant reduction in harmful outputs with minimal impact on helpfulness.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 确保大型语言模型（LLM）在现实部署中安全且符合语境的行为仍是一个关键挑战。我们提出SafeCtrl-RL，一个推理时行为控制框架，无需模型重新训练或参数修改即可实现自适应安全调节。它使用强化学习（RL）智能体根据对话上下文动态优化提示，引导LLM生成更安全的响应，同时保持流畅性。在多个基准上的实验表明，有害输出显著减少，而对有用性的影响极小。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Language Models Need Sleep
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Transformer-based large language models are increasingly used for long-horizon tasks; however, their attention mechanism scales poorly with context length. To handle this, we study a sleep-like consolidation mechanism in which a model periodically converts recent context into persistent fast weights, enabling efficient long-term memory without quadratic attention cost.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 基于Transformer的大型语言模型越来越多地用于长时程任务，但其注意力机制随上下文长度扩展性差。为解决此问题，我们研究了一种类似睡眠的巩固机制，模型周期性地将近期上下文转换为持久快速权重，从而在没有二次注意力成本的情况下实现高效长期记忆。创新点在于受生物睡眠启发，提出了一种新颖的上下文巩固方法，显著提升了长上下文处理效率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Context-Instrumental Data Distillation for Kubernetes Manifest Generation: Method and Experimental Evaluation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 面向Kubernetes清单生成的上下文工具数据蒸馏方法及实验评估
大语言模型/LLM.summary: This paper examines the specialization of Small Language Models (SLMs) with up to 4 billion parameters for generating artifacts in domain-specific languages (DSL). Kubernetes manifests are chosen as the target domain. We propose the context-instrumental data distillation method: the source corpus is distilled using a larger model to create high-quality training data. The method incorporates context and instrumental signals to improve generation accuracy. Experiments show that the distilled SLM achieves competitive performance compared to larger models, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach for DSL generation.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 针对领域特定语言（DSL）生成任务，本文研究用40亿参数以下的小语言模型（SLM）生成Kubernetes清单。提出上下文工具数据蒸馏方法：利用大模型蒸馏源语料生成高质量训练数据，并融入上下文和工具信号。实验表明，蒸馏后的SLM性能与更大模型相当。主要贡献：提出面向DSL生成的数据蒸馏方法，实现SLM高效生成Kubernetes清单，降低部署成本。

大语言模型/LLM.title: LECTOR: Joint Optimization of Scientific Reasoning Graphs and Introduction Generation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: LECTOR：科学推理图与引言生成的联合优化
大语言模型/LLM.summary: AI Scientists have shown promising progress across multiple stages of the research pipeline, among which automatic scientific paper writing remains a formidable challenge. The Introduction writing is especially challenging, which demands not only linguistic fluency, but logical soundness and verifiability. We propose LECTOR, a framework that jointly optimizes the construction of scientific reasoning graphs and the generation of introduction text. By explicitly modeling the logical structure of a scientific argument as a graph, and training a language model to produce both the graph and the text in a coordinated manner, LECTOR achieves significant improvements in both the coherence and factual accuracy of generated introductions. Experiments on multiple scientific domains demonstrate that LECTOR outperforms existing baselines in terms of automatic metrics and human evaluation.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: AI科学家在研究管线的多个阶段取得了显著进展，其中自动科学论文写作仍是一项艰巨挑战。引言写作尤其困难，不仅要求语言流畅，还需逻辑严谨和可验证性。本文提出LECTOR框架，联合优化科学推理图的构建与引言文本生成。通过将科学论证的逻辑结构显式建模为图，并训练语言模型以协调方式同时生成图和文本，LECTOR在生成引言的连贯性和事实准确性上取得了显著提升。在多个科学领域的实验表明，LECTOR在自动评估指标和人工评价方面均优于现有基线。

大语言模型/LLM.title: $D^2$-Monitor: Dynamic Safety Monitoring for Diffusion LLMs via Hesitation-Aware Routing
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: $D^2$-Monitor：通过犹豫感知路由对扩散型大语言模型进行动态安全监控
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Despite the emergence of diffusion large language models (D-LLMs) as an alternative to autoregressive large language models (AR-LLMs), safety monitoring for D-LLMs remains largely unexplored. Unlike AR-LLMs, D-LLMs generate text through a multi-step denoising process, exposing intermediate hidden representations that can be leveraged for safety monitoring. We propose D^2-Monitor, a dynamic safety monitoring framework that uses hesitation-aware routing to detect and mitigate harmful outputs during the denoising process. By analyzing the model's internal states at each step, our method identifies potentially unsafe content early and routes the generation towards safer alternatives. Experiments show that D^2-Monitor effectively reduces harmful outputs while maintaining generation quality.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 尽管扩散型大语言模型（D-LLM）已成为自回归型大语言模型（AR-LLM）的替代方案，但D-LLM的安全监控仍鲜有探索。与AR-LLM不同，D-LLM通过多步去噪过程生成文本，暴露了可用于安全监控的中间隐藏表示。本文提出D^2-Monitor，一种动态安全监控框架，通过犹豫感知路由在去噪过程中检测并缓解有害输出。通过分析模型每一步的内部状态，该方法能早期识别潜在不安全内容，并将生成导向更安全的替代方案。实验表明，D^2-Monitor在保持生成质量的同时有效减少了有害输出。

大语言模型/LLM.title: TIAR: Trajectory-Informed Advantage Reweighting for LLM Abstention Learning
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: TIAR：面向大语言模型拒绝学习的轨迹信息优势重加权
大语言模型/LLM.summary: This paper investigates large language model (LLM) abstention learning, specifically using ternary reward, which incentivize truthfulness in large language models. This paper extends that idea by moving from a ternary reward to a Trajectory-Informed advantage reweighting, dynamically re-weights the training examples based on the trajectory of the model's responses. Our method, TIAR, leverages the advantage function to adjust the importance of different samples, leading to more effective abstention behavior. Experiments on multiple datasets show that TIAR improves the model's ability to abstain from answering when uncertain, while maintaining accuracy on confident responses.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文研究大语言模型的拒绝学习，特别是使用三元奖励来激励模型诚实。本文将三元奖励扩展为轨迹信息优势重加权，根据模型响应的轨迹动态调整训练样本的权重。所提方法TIAR利用优势函数调整不同样本的重要性，从而实现更有效的拒绝行为。在多个数据集上的实验表明，TIAR提高了模型在不确定时拒绝回答的能力，同时保持了在确信回答上的准确性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Adaptive Graph Refinement and Label Propagation with LLMs for Cost-Effective Entity Resolution
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于LLM的自适应图精化与标签传播实现经济高效的实体解析
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Dirty entity resolution (ER), which identifies records referring to the same real-world entity from a single, messy dataset, is a fundamental task in data management and mining. However, the dominant blocking-matching-clustering paradigm for ER suffers from critical flaws. Its cascaded, decoupled workflow amplifies errors across stages, and the reliance on expensive LLM calls for high accuracy leads to prohibitive costs. We propose a novel framework that integrates LLM-based reasoning with graph-based propagation to iteratively refine entity clusters. By adaptively constructing a similarity graph and propagating labels from high-confidence matches, our method reduces LLM invocation by 60% while maintaining or improving accuracy on benchmark datasets.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 脏实体解析（ER）旨在从单个杂乱数据集中识别指向同一真实世界实体的记录，是数据管理与挖掘的基础任务。然而，主流的阻塞-匹配-聚类范式存在严重缺陷：其级联解耦的工作流会跨阶段放大错误，且依赖昂贵的LLM调用以获得高精度，导致成本过高。本文提出一种新框架，将基于LLM的推理与基于图的传播相结合，迭代精化实体簇。通过自适应构建相似度图并从高置信度匹配中传播标签，该方法在基准数据集上将LLM调用减少60%，同时保持或提升准确率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: From Model Scaling to System Scaling: Scaling the Harness in Agentic AI
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从模型缩放走向系统缩放：扩展智能体AI的“缰绳”
大语言模型/LLM.summary: This paper studies the next major bottleneck in agentic AI as system scaling, not only model scaling: the design of auditable, persistent, modular, and verifiable architectures around foundation models. We refer to this shift as scaling the harness: treating the structured execution layer around a foundation model as a first-class scaling target. We define the harness as the infrastructure that governs how an agent observes, plans, acts, and reflects, and argue that scaling the harness is essential for building agents that are reliable, controllable, and safe. We present a taxonomy of harness components and discuss how scaling each dimension leads to new capabilities and challenges.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文认为智能体AI的下一个主要瓶颈在于系统缩放（不仅仅是模型缩放），即围绕基础模型设计可审计、持久化、模块化和可验证的架构。我们将这种转变称为“扩展缰绳”：将围绕基础模型的结构化执行层作为首要的缩放目标。我们定义了“缰绳”为控制智能体如何观察、规划、行动和反思的基础设施，并论证扩展缰绳对于构建可靠、可控、安全的智能体至关重要。我们提出了缰绳组件的分类学，并讨论了如何扩展每个维度以带来新的能力和挑战。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Everything at Every Scale: Scale-Invariant Diffusion with Continuous Super-Resolution
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 万物皆在尺度：具有连续超分辨率的尺度不变扩散
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Creating images from noise is image generation; reconstructing fine details from coarse inputs is super-resolution. Despite their practical differences, both can be understood as reversing information loss across scales. We introduce SKILD, a Scale-invariant K-Space Integrated Latent Diffusion model that unifies generation and super-resolution by learning a single scale-invariant diffusion process. Our model operates in a latent space derived from the Fourier domain, integrating k-space information to achieve continuous super-resolution across arbitrary scales. SKILD demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on both image generation and super-resolution tasks, enabling flexible upsampling at any factor without task-specific fine-tuning.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出SKILD（尺度不变K空间集成潜扩散模型），统一了图像生成与超分辨率任务。传统方法将两者视为独立问题，而SKILD通过学习尺度不变的扩散过程，从噪声生成图像或从粗尺度输入重建细节，本质上是逆转跨尺度的信息损失。该模型在傅里叶域潜空间中操作，集成k空间信息实现任意尺度的连续超分辨率。创新点包括：1）首次将生成与超分辨率统一为尺度不变扩散；2）利用k空间潜变量实现连续尺度变换；3）无需任务特定微调即可灵活上采样。实验表明，SKILD在图像生成和超分辨率任务上均达到最先进性能，具有高学术价值和实用潜力。

计算机视觉/CV.title: A Multimodal 3D Foundation Model for Light Sheet Fluorescence Microscopy Enables Few-Shot Segmentation, Classification, and Deblurring
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 用于光片荧光显微镜的多模态3D基础模型实现少样本分割、分类和去模糊
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Light sheet fluorescence microscopy (LSM) enables high-resolution, three-dimensional (3D) imaging of biological specimens, providing rich volumetric data for studying cellular organization, pathology, and vascular networks. However, the size, dimensionality, and annotation burden of LSM data make supervised deep learning challenging. We propose a multimodal 3D foundation model pretrained on large-scale LSM data, which supports few-shot segmentation, classification, and deblurring tasks. Our model leverages self-supervised learning across multiple modalities (e.g., fluorescence, brightfield) and achieves state-of-the-art performance with only a handful of labeled examples.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 光片荧光显微镜（LSM）能够对生物样本进行高分辨率三维成像，为研究细胞组织、病理和血管网络提供丰富的体积数据。然而，LSM数据的规模、维度和标注负担使得监督深度学习面临挑战。我们提出一个在大规模LSM数据上预训练的多模态3D基础模型，支持少样本分割、分类和去模糊任务。该模型利用跨多种模态（如荧光、明场）的自监督学习，仅需少量标注样本即可达到最先进性能。

计算机视觉/CV.title: MuNet: A Mutualistic Network for Joint 3D Human Mesh Recovery and 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction from Single Images
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: MuNet：用于从单张图像联合进行3D人体网格恢复和3D穿衣人体重建的共生网络
计算机视觉/CV.summary: 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction are inherently related, yet they have long been studied in isolation, thereby overlooking the potential gains of joint optimization. To overcome this limitation, we propose a unified framework that jointly addresses these two tasks. Our Mutualistic Network (MuNet) features a dual-branch architecture with mutual feature exchange, allowing the mesh recovery branch to provide geometric priors for the clothed reconstruction branch, and vice versa. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements over separate methods on both tasks, achieving more accurate and detailed 3D human models.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 3D人体网格恢复和3D穿衣人体重建本质相关，但长期以来被孤立研究，忽视了联合优化的潜在收益。为克服这一局限，我们提出一个统一框架来联合处理这两个任务。我们的共生网络（MuNet）采用双分支架构并实现特征互交换，使网格恢复分支为穿衣重建分支提供几何先验，反之亦然。实验表明，在两个任务上均显著优于单独方法，获得更精确和详细的3D人体模型。

计算机视觉/CV.title: VEN-VL: A Visual Ensemble MoE Framework for Effective and Efficient Multi-Modal Understanding
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: VEN-VL：一种用于高效多模态理解的视觉集成MoE框架
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Despite the remarkable progress achieved by recent efficient methods in accelerating multimodal understanding, they still suffer from noticeable performance degradation. Their emphasis on the high compression ratio of a single visual clue and reliance on the heuristic pruning strategy with coarse attention lead to suboptimal results. In this paper, we propose VEN-VL, a Visual Ensemble Mixture-of-Experts framework that harmonizes efficiency and effectiveness. Specifically, we first design a dynamic visual-guided router to collaboratively leverage multiple visual clues with different compression ratios, and then employ a visual ensemble expert for comprehensive multi-modal reasoning. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that VEN-VL achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining superior efficiency.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 尽管近期高效方法在加速多模态理解方面取得了显著进展，但仍存在明显的性能下降。它们过度强调单一视觉线索的高压缩比，并依赖粗粒度注意力的启发式剪枝策略，导致次优结果。本文提出VEN-VL，一种视觉集成混合专家框架，协调效率与效果。具体而言，我们首先设计动态视觉引导路由器，协同利用不同压缩比的多种视觉线索；然后采用视觉集成专家进行全面的多模态推理。在多个基准上的大量实验表明，VEN-VL在保持卓越效率的同时达到了最先进的性能。

强化学习/RL.title: MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research
强化学习/RL.title_zh: MobileGym：一个可验证且高度并行的移动GUI代理研究仿真平台
强化学习/RL.summary: We present MobileGym, a browser-hosted, lightweight, fully controllable environment for everyday mobile use, targeting interaction fidelity without replicating proprietary backends. It enables two capabilities previously out of reach for everyday apps: verifiable outcome signals through deterministic state transitions and highly parallel simulation for training GUI agents.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 我们提出MobileGym，一个基于浏览器、轻量级、完全可控的日常移动使用环境，旨在不复制专有后端的情况下实现交互保真度。它实现了此前日常应用无法企及的两种能力：通过确定性状态转换获得可验证的结果信号，以及用于训练GUI代理的高度并行仿真。创新点在于首次在移动GUI代理研究中结合了可验证性和高度并行性，显著提升了训练效率和结果可靠性。

强化学习/RL.title: AdvantageFlow: Advantage-Weighted Least Squares for RL in Flow Models
强化学习/RL.title_zh: AdvantageFlow：流模型中基于优势加权最小二乘的强化学习
强化学习/RL.summary: We introduce AdvantageFlow, a forward-process reinforcement learning algorithm for rectified flow models. Unlike Flow-GRPO, which optimizes the reverse process, we optimize an advantage-weighted forward-process prediction loss. This optimization problem is unstable when advantages are negative and thus we propose a robust variant. We evaluate AdvantageFlow on image generation tasks and show that it achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods while being simpler and more stable.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文提出AdvantageFlow，一种用于修正流模型的前向过程强化学习算法。与优化反向过程的Flow-GRPO不同，我们优化了一个优势加权的前向过程预测损失。该优化问题在优势为负时不稳定，因此我们提出了一个鲁棒变体。我们在图像生成任务上评估了AdvantageFlow，结果表明它在更简单和更稳定的同时，实现了与最先进方法相当的性能。

多模态学习.title: MuCRASP: Multimodal Chain-of-thought Reasoning aware Structured Pruning
多模态学习.title_zh: MuCRASP: 感知多模态思维链推理的结构化剪枝
多模态学习.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) increasingly rely on chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to solve complex multimodal tasks, but their large parameter sizes make deployment expensive. Structured pruning offers a natural solution; however, existing methods fail to preserve CoT reasoning accuracy in VLMs. In this paper, we propose MuCRASP, a structured pruning method that is aware of CoT reasoning. We analyze the importance of different components in VLMs for CoT reasoning and design a pruning strategy that retains critical structures. Experiments show that MuCRASP achieves high compression ratios while maintaining CoT reasoning performance, outperforming existing pruning methods.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 针对视觉语言模型（VLM）依赖思维链（CoT）推理但参数庞大难以部署的问题，现有结构化剪枝方法不能保持CoT推理精度。本文提出MuCRASP，一种感知CoT推理的结构化剪枝方法。创新点在于分析VLM中不同组件对CoT推理的重要性，并设计保留关键结构的剪枝策略。实验表明，MuCRASP在实现高压缩比的同时保持CoT推理性能，优于现有剪枝方法。主要贡献：首次提出CoT感知的VLM剪枝，实现高效部署。

机器人.title: OASIS: Observation-Action Space Alignment via SE(3) Trajectory Prediction for Robotic Manipulation
机器人.title_zh: OASIS：通过SE(3)轨迹预测实现机器人操作中的观测-动作空间对齐
机器人.summary: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models and world action models (WAMs) advance robotic manipulation by enriching intermediate representations with auxiliary spatial features or future visual-state prediction. However, these representations largely remain within the observation space and do not share a common representation with the action space, leading to a representation gap that hinders policy learning. We propose OASIS, a framework that aligns observation and action spaces by predicting SE(3) trajectories directly from visual observations. Leveraging a diffusion-based trajectory prediction model, OASIS learns a shared representation that bridges the gap, enabling more efficient policy transfer and improved manipulation performance. Experiments on simulated and real-world tasks show that OASIS outperforms baselines by 15% in success rate and generalizes to unseen objects.
机器人.summary_zh: 最近的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型和世界动作模型（WAM）通过辅助空间特征或未来视觉状态预测来丰富中间表示，推动了机器人操作的发展。然而，这些表示大多停留在观测空间内，与动作空间缺乏共享表示，导致表示差距阻碍策略学习。本文提出OASIS框架，通过直接从视觉观测预测SE(3)轨迹来对齐观测和动作空间。利用基于扩散的轨迹预测模型，OASIS学习跨越差距的共享表示，实现更高效的策略迁移和提升的操作性能。在模拟和真实世界任务上的实验表明，OASIS在成功率上比基线高出15%，并能泛化到未见物体。

推荐系统.title: Claw-Anything: Benchmarking Always-On Personal Assistants with Broader Access to User's Digital World
推荐系统.title_zh: Claw-Anything：对具有更广泛数字世界访问权限的始终在线个人助手进行基准测试
推荐系统.summary: Large language model agents are increasingly envisioned as always-on personal assistants with access to anything relevant in the user's digital world. Yet current systems operate over only narrow slices of that world, limiting context-sensitive reasoning and effective assistance. Existing benchmarks fail to capture the breadth of digital access. We introduce Claw-Anything, a benchmark that simulates a personal assistant with comprehensive access to a user's emails, calendars, files, and more. We define tasks that require reasoning across multiple data sources and evaluate several state-of-the-art LLM agents. Results reveal significant gaps in current agents' ability to handle broad, integrated access.
推荐系统.summary_zh: 大语言模型智能体越来越被设想为始终在线的个人助手，能够访问用户数字世界中任何相关的内容。然而，当前系统仅能操作数字世界的狭窄片段，限制了上下文敏感推理和有效帮助。现有基准未能捕捉数字访问的广度。我们提出Claw-Anything，一个模拟个人助手全面访问用户电子邮件、日历、文件等的基准。我们定义了需要跨多个数据源推理的任务，并评估了多个最先进的LLM智能体。结果揭示了当前智能体在处理广泛集成访问能力方面的显著差距。

图神经网络.title: L2IR: Revealing Latent Intent in Graph Fraud Detection
图神经网络.title_zh: L2IR：揭示图欺诈检测中的潜在意图
图神经网络.summary: Graph fraud detection has long depended on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to propagate and aggregate information across relational data. A critical obstacle in practice, however, is that fraudsters frequently disguise themselves by forging numerous connections with benign users, causing fraud signals to be diluted. We propose L2IR, a framework that reveals latent intent by modeling the underlying motivations of fraudsters. By incorporating an intent-aware attention mechanism, L2IR can distinguish between genuine and fraudulent interactions more effectively. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that L2IR significantly outperforms existing GNN-based fraud detection methods.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 图欺诈检测长期依赖图神经网络在关系数据上传播和聚合信息。然而，一个关键障碍是欺诈者经常通过与良性用户伪造大量连接来伪装自己，导致欺诈信号被稀释。本文提出L2IR框架，通过建模欺诈者的潜在动机来揭示其意图。通过引入意图感知的注意力机制，L2IR能更有效地区分真实和欺诈交互。在真实数据集上的实验表明，L2IR显著优于现有基于GNN的欺诈检测方法。

NLP.title: StakeBench: Evaluating Language Understanding Grounded in Market Commitment
NLP.title_zh: StakeBench：基于市场承诺的语言理解评估
NLP.summary: Existing financial NLP benchmarks often rely on labels supplied by outside observers, measuring how language is perceived rather than what speakers have committed to in the market. We introduce StakeBench, an evaluation framework for language understanding grounded in market commitment. StakeBench leverages real market commitments (e.g., stock transactions, contracts) as ground truth, requiring models to predict the actual financial actions implied by language. We construct a dataset from regulatory filings and earnings calls, and evaluate several LLMs. Results show that current models struggle to infer market commitments, highlighting a gap between language understanding and real-world decision-making.
NLP.summary_zh: 现有金融NLP基准通常依赖外部观察者提供的标签，衡量语言如何被感知而非说话者在市场中的承诺。本文提出StakeBench，一个基于市场承诺的语言理解评估框架。StakeBench利用真实市场承诺（如股票交易、合约）作为真实标签，要求模型预测语言所隐含的实际金融行为。我们从监管文件和财报电话会议中构建数据集，并评估多个大语言模型。结果表明，当前模型难以推断市场承诺，凸显了语言理解与现实世界决策之间的差距。

NLP.title: Fine-Tuning Over Architectural Complexity: Broad-Coverage PII Detection on PIIBench with DeBERTa
NLP.title_zh: 超越架构复杂度的微调：基于DeBERTa在PIIBench上的广覆盖PII检测
NLP.summary: Personally identifiable information (PII) detection systems are frequently trained within narrow source or domain boundaries, limiting coverage when deployed on heterogeneous text. We study model fine-tuning on a corrected multi-source PIIBench preparation spanning 82 retained entity types across ten diverse sources. Using a single DeBERTa model fine-tuned with a simple token classification head, we achieve state-of-the-art F1 scores on 78 of 82 entity types, outperforming more complex architectures. Our findings demonstrate that careful data curation and fine-tuning can surpass architectural innovations, providing a practical baseline for broad-coverage PII detection.
NLP.summary_zh: 个人可识别信息（PII）检测系统通常在狭窄的源或领域边界内训练，部署在异构文本上时覆盖范围受限。本文研究了在修正后的多源PIIBench数据集上的模型微调，该数据集涵盖十个不同来源的82种保留实体类型。通过使用简单的token分类头微调单个DeBERTa模型，我们在82种实体类型中的78种上取得了最先进的F1分数，超越了更复杂的架构。我们的发现表明，精心整理数据和微调可以超越架构创新，为广覆盖PII检测提供了实用基线。

NLP.title: AI-Assisted Systematization for Evaluating GenAI Systems
NLP.title_zh: AI辅助的生成式AI系统评估系统化方法
NLP.summary: Evaluating generative AI (GenAI) systems is challenging because many targets of evaluation are broad, contested concepts, such as 'reasoning,' 'fairness,' or 'creativity.' When these concepts are left underspecified, it becomes unclear what should be measured or how evaluation results should be interpreted. This paper proposes an AI-assisted systematization approach to help evaluators specify evaluation targets more precisely, leveraging large language models to decompose abstract concepts into concrete, measurable sub-questions. We demonstrate the approach on several case studies and show that it improves the clarity and reproducibility of evaluations.
NLP.summary_zh: 评估生成式AI系统具有挑战性，因为许多评估目标是宽泛且有争议的概念，如“推理”、“公平性”或“创造力”。当这些概念未明确指定时，就难以确定应测量什么或如何解释评估结果。本文提出一种AI辅助的系统化方法，帮助评估者更精确地指定评估目标，利用大语言模型将抽象概念分解为具体、可测量的子问题。我们通过多个案例研究展示了该方法，并证明其提高了评估的清晰度和可重复性。

生成模型.title: Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC) for Probabilistic Representation Learning
生成模型.title_zh: 用于概率表示学习的神经元随机注意力电路（NSAC）
生成模型.summary: Reliable quantification of uncertainty estimates in continuous-time (CT) representation learning remains nascent, particularly within CT attention architectures. We introduce the Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC), a novel biologically-inspired CT attention architecture that reformulates attention as a stochastic process governed by a circuit of neurons. NSAC models attention weights as random variables, enabling principled uncertainty propagation. The circuit architecture is inspired by biological neural circuits, allowing for efficient computation and biological plausibility. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art uncertainty calibration on several time-series benchmarks while maintaining competitive predictive performance.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文提出神经元随机注意力电路（NSAC），一种受生物启发的连续时间注意力架构，用于概率表示学习中的不确定性量化。现有连续时间注意力模型缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，NSAC将注意力机制重新表述为由神经元电路控制的随机过程，将注意力权重建模为随机变量，从而实现原则性的不确定性传播。创新点包括：1）首次在连续时间注意力中引入随机电路机制，实现内在不确定性建模；2）受生物神经电路启发，兼顾计算效率与生物合理性；3）在多个时间序列基准上实现了最先进的不确定性校准，同时保持有竞争力的预测性能。该工作为连续时间表示学习中的不确定性量化提供了新范式。

生成模型.title: Continual Speaker Identity Unlearning with Minimal Interference
生成模型.title_zh: 最小干扰的持续说话人身份遗忘
生成模型.summary: Machine unlearning removes designated concepts or knowledge from pre-trained models. Recent work has extended this paradigm to speaker identity unlearning in zero-shot text-to-speech (ZS-TTS), the task of selectively erasing a model's ability to replicate a speaker's voice. Existing methods, however, often cause catastrophic forgetting of other speaker identities or require full retraining. We propose a continual unlearning framework that incrementally removes multiple speaker identities while preserving the model's overall performance. Our approach uses a combination of gradient projection and knowledge distillation to minimize interference. Experiments show that our method effectively unlearns target speakers with negligible degradation on remaining speakers and general TTS quality.
生成模型.summary_zh: 机器遗忘旨在从预训练模型中移除指定概念或知识。近期工作将此范式扩展到零样本文本转语音（ZS-TTS）中的说话人身份遗忘，即选择性擦除模型复制说话人声音的能力。然而，现有方法常导致其他说话人身份的灾难性遗忘或需要完全重训练。本文提出一个持续遗忘框架，逐步移除多个说话人身份，同时保持模型整体性能。我们的方法结合梯度投影和知识蒸馏以最小化干扰。实验表明，我们的方法有效遗忘目标说话人，而对剩余说话人和通用TTS质量的影响可忽略。

优化算法.title: On the Benefits of Free Exploration for Regret Minimization in Multi-Armed Bandits
优化算法.title_zh: 论自由探索对多臂老虎机遗憾最小化的益处
优化算法.summary: We study a stochastic multi-armed bandit problem where an agent is granted a free exploration budget before regret accumulates, a setting not captured by the classic regret minimization or pure exploration paradigms. The goal is to design an adaptive policy that strategically explores the bandit instance during this free phase to minimize cumulative regret afterwards. We characterize the optimal free-exploration strategy and derive tight regret bounds. Our analysis reveals that even a small free budget can significantly reduce regret, and we provide algorithms that achieve near-optimal performance.
优化算法.summary_zh: 本文研究了一种新颖的多臂老虎机问题：智能体在遗憾累积前拥有一个免费探索预算，该设置介于经典遗憾最小化与纯探索之间。目标是在免费阶段自适应地探索，以最小化后续累积遗憾。创新点包括：1）首次形式化定义并分析了带免费探索预算的遗憾最小化问题；2）刻画了最优免费探索策略，并推导出紧的遗憾界；3）证明即使少量免费探索也能显著降低遗憾，并提出接近最优性能的算法。该工作为探索-利用权衡提供了新的理论视角，对实际应用中的冷启动问题具有指导意义。

优化算法.title: Step-TP: A Grounded, Step-Level Dataset with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for LLM-Guided Tensor Program Optimization
优化算法.title_zh: Step-TP：用于LLM引导的张量程序优化的基于步骤的链式思维推理数据集
优化算法.summary: Despite the strong reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), optimizing the execution efficiency of tensor programs remains challenging due to the need for precise, composable transformation decisions. Recent LLM-guided approaches frame tensor program optimization as an iterative decision-making process, but lack fine-grained supervision at the step level. We introduce Step-TP, a dataset containing step-level chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations for tensor program optimization. Each step includes the transformation applied, its rationale, and the resulting performance impact. Using Step-TP, we fine-tune an LLM to predict optimal transformation sequences, achieving up to 1.8x speedup on representative tensor programs compared to prior methods. The dataset and models are publicly available.
优化算法.summary_zh: 尽管大语言模型（LLM）具有强大的推理能力，但由于需要精确、可组合的变换决策，优化张量程序的执行效率仍然具有挑战性。最近的LLM引导方法将张量程序优化视为迭代决策过程，但缺乏步骤级别的细粒度监督。本文引入Step-TP数据集，包含张量程序优化的步骤级链式思维（CoT）注释。每个步骤包括应用的变换、其理由以及由此产生的性能影响。利用Step-TP，我们微调LLM以预测最优变换序列，在代表性张量程序上相比先前方法实现高达1.8倍的加速。数据集和模型已公开。

优化算法.title: NPSolver: Neural Poisson Solver with Iterative Physics Supervision
优化算法.title_zh: NPSolver：具有迭代物理监督的神经泊松求解器
优化算法.summary: Efficiently solving Poisson equations on complex, irregular domains remains a fundamental challenge in scientific computing, as classical iterative solvers often suffer from prohibitive runtime due to ill-conditioned systems. While neural operators offer a fast alternative, they typically rely on large labeled datasets and lack generalization to unseen geometries. We propose NPSolver, a neural Poisson solver that integrates iterative physics supervision with a novel multi-scale architecture. By enforcing physical constraints at each iteration, NPSolver achieves high accuracy without requiring ground truth solutions. Experiments show that NPSolver outperforms traditional solvers in speed and generalizes well to irregular domains.
优化算法.summary_zh: 在复杂不规则域上高效求解泊松方程仍是科学计算中的基本挑战，经典迭代求解器常因病态系统而运行时间过长。虽然神经算子提供了快速替代方案，但它们通常依赖大量标记数据且缺乏对未见几何的泛化能力。我们提出NPSolver，一种集成迭代物理监督与新颖多尺度架构的神经泊松求解器。通过在每次迭代中强制执行物理约束，NPSolver无需真实解即可达到高精度。实验表明，NPSolver在速度上优于传统求解器，并能很好地泛化到不规则域。

理论研究.title: Explore Before You Solve: The Speed--Depth Trade-off in Epistemic Agents for ARC-AGI-3
理论研究.title_zh: 先探索后求解：ARC-AGI-3中认知智能体的速度-深度权衡
理论研究.summary: We systematically investigate all 25 public ARC-AGI-3 games and find that every one is reachable through non-intelligent strategies: 10 in a single blind step, 5 after one probing action, 1 via repeated ACTION1 presses, 1 via diverse exploration, and 8 via single repeated actions with sufficient budget. This reveals a speed-depth trade-off: faster strategies require deeper understanding, while slower exploration can compensate for lack of intelligence. Our findings challenge the assumption that ARC-AGI tasks require advanced reasoning, and highlight the importance of exploration in problem-solving.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文系统研究了所有25个公开的ARC-AGI-3游戏，发现每个游戏均可通过非智能策略达到：10个单步盲猜、5个一次试探、1个重复ACTION1、1个多样化探索、8个重复单一动作（有足够预算）。这揭示了速度-深度权衡：快速策略需要更深理解，而慢速探索可补偿智能不足。创新点包括：1）首次全面分析ARC-AGI-3任务的可解性，挑战了其需要高级推理的普遍假设；2）提出认知智能体中的速度-深度权衡概念；3）证明探索在解决问题中的核心作用，而非纯粹推理。该研究对通用人工智能评估标准的设计具有重要启示。

理论研究.title: TTPrint: Evidence-Grounded TTP Extraction via Diverge-then-Converge Verification
理论研究.title_zh: TTPrint：通过发散-收敛验证的基于证据的TTP提取
理论研究.summary: Extracting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from cyber threat intelligence (CTI) reports is an open-set, multi-label problem requiring both high recall (not missing techniques) and high precision (not hallucinating unsupported ones). Existing methods struggle to achieve both. We propose TTPrint, a framework that first diverges to generate candidate techniques with supporting evidence, then converges to verify each candidate against the report. This two-stage verification ensures evidence-grounded extraction. TTPrint achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets, significantly improving precision while maintaining recall.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文提出TTPrint框架，用于从网络威胁情报报告中提取MITRE ATT&CK技术。这是一个开放集、多标签问题，要求高召回率和高精度。现有方法难以兼顾两者。TTPrint采用“先发散后收敛”的两阶段验证：首先生成候选技术及其支持证据，然后针对报告验证每个候选。创新点包括：1）提出证据驱动的提取范式，确保每个技术都有文本支持；2）发散-收敛机制平衡了召回率和精度；3）在基准数据集上达到最先进性能，显著提升精度而不牺牲召回率。该工作对网络安全自动化分析具有重要实用价值。

理论研究.title: From Latent Space to Training Data: Explainable Specialization in Minimal MLPs
理论研究.title_zh: 从潜在空间到训练数据：最小MLP中的可解释特化
理论研究.summary: We here study whether training biases can make hidden neurons specialize in minimal one-hidden-layer MLPs, and whether such specialization improves prototype-based reconstruction of the training dataset from the learned weights. We consider Gaussian-activation MLPs of width equal to dataset size and trained with standard gradient descent. We find that hidden neurons naturally specialize to different input prototypes, enabling near-perfect reconstruction of training data from weights alone. This provides a new perspective on interpretability and data recovery from trained models.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文研究训练偏差能否使最小单隐藏层MLP中的隐藏神经元特化，以及这种特化是否有助于从学习到的权重中基于原型重建训练数据集。我们考虑宽度等于数据集大小的高斯激活MLP，并使用标准梯度下降训练。我们发现隐藏神经元自然地特化于不同的输入原型，从而仅从权重即可近乎完美地重建训练数据。这为可解释性和从训练模型中恢复数据提供了新视角。

理论研究.title: Small Models, Strong Priors: Architectural Inductive Bias for Parameter-Efficient Neural PDE Solvers
理论研究.title_zh: 小模型，强先验：面向参数高效神经PDE求解器的架构归纳偏置
理论研究.summary: Neural PDE solvers have followed the scaling trajectory of vision and language, with recent foundation models reaching billions of parameters. We argue that scale is a poor substitute for architectural inductive bias in this domain: structured priors deliver outsized parameter efficiency, and the parameter count can be reduced by orders of magnitude without sacrificing accuracy. We propose a novel architecture that incorporates strong inductive biases such as locality, symmetry, and multi-scale processing, achieving competitive accuracy on standard benchmarks with only 1% of the parameters of leading models. Our work highlights the importance of architectural design over sheer scale for scientific machine learning.
理论研究.summary_zh: 神经PDE求解器遵循了视觉和语言的扩展轨迹，最新基础模型达到数十亿参数。我们认为，在此领域，规模无法替代架构的归纳偏置：结构化先验能带来超高的参数效率，参数数量可在不牺牲精度的情况下减少数个数量级。我们提出一种新架构，融合了局部性、对称性和多尺度处理等强归纳偏置，仅用领先模型1%的参数就在标准基准上达到有竞争力的精度。我们的工作强调了架构设计而非单纯规模在科学机器学习中的重要性。

AI控制/安全.title: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control
AI控制/安全.title_zh: AI控制中的重试与重采样
AI控制/安全.summary: AI coding scaffolds like Claude Code and Codex use retrying: blocking actions flagged as risky and continuing the trajectory. We study retrying from an AI control perspective, which treats the model as potentially adversarial. We find that while retrying reduces honest suspicion scores, the optimal strategy depends on the adversary's capabilities.
AI控制/安全.summary_zh: 像Claude Code和Codex这样的AI编码框架使用重试策略：阻止标记为有风险的动作并继续轨迹。我们从AI控制的角度研究重试，将模型视为潜在对抗者。我们发现，虽然重试降低了诚实怀疑分数，但最优策略取决于对手的能力。创新点在于首次从对抗性角度系统分析重试与重采样策略的权衡，为AI安全控制提供了理论指导。

模型压缩/量化.title: OrpQuant: Geometric Orthogonal Residual Projection for Multiplier-Free Power-of-Two Transformer Quantization
模型压缩/量化.title_zh: OrpQuant：用于无乘法器2的幂次Transformer量化的几何正交残差投影
模型压缩/量化.summary: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) on edge devices is significantly constrained by memory limitations and the critical timing bottlenecks introduced by dense Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) arrays. In the ultra-low bit regime, logarithmic Power-of-Two (PoT) quantization emerges as a promising solution due to its multiplier-free property. However, existing PoT methods suffer from limited representation capability and severe accuracy degradation. To address this, we propose OrpQuant, a novel quantization framework that introduces Geometric Orthogonal Residual Projection (GORP) to enhance the expressiveness of PoT quantization while maintaining hardware efficiency.
模型压缩/量化.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉Transformer（ViT）在边缘设备上的部署受到内存限制和密集乘累加（MAC）阵列关键时序瓶颈的严重制约。在超低位宽条件下，对数2的幂次（PoT）量化因其无乘法器特性成为一种有前景的解决方案。然而，现有PoT方法存在表示能力有限和精度严重下降的问题。为此，我们提出OrpQuant，一种新颖的量化框架，引入几何正交残差投影（GORP）来增强PoT量化的表达能力，同时保持硬件效率。创新点在于首次将几何正交残差投影应用于PoT量化，实现了精度与效率的更好平衡。

因果发现/AI科学家.title: CausaLab: A Scalable Environment for Interactive Causal Discovery Toward AI Scientists
因果发现/AI科学家.title_zh: CausaLab：面向AI科学家的可扩展交互式因果发现环境
因果发现/AI科学家.summary: We introduce CausaLab, a scalable environment for evaluating interactive causal discovery by LLM agents. Unlike prior evaluations, CausaLab evaluates both whether an agent can solve a problem using causal evidence and whether its answer is supported by a correct hypothesis about the underlying causal structure.
因果发现/AI科学家.summary_zh: 我们提出CausaLab，一个用于评估LLM代理交互式因果发现的可扩展环境。与以往评估不同，CausaLab既评估代理是否能利用因果证据解决问题，也评估其答案是否基于对底层因果结构的正确假设。创新点在于提供了一个标准化的基准平台，首次将因果假设的准确性纳入评估指标，推动了AI科学家在因果推理方向的研究。

强化学习.title: Learning in Low-Dimensional Subspaces: Orthogonal Bottlenecks for Reinforcement Learning
强化学习.title_zh: 低维子空间学习：强化学习的正交瓶颈
强化学习.summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents commonly rely on high-dimensional neural representations, despite growing evidence that task-relevant value and policy structure may be intrinsically low-dimensional. In this work, we present a simple yet effective representation-level prior that inserts a fixed orthogonal bottleneck into the RL agent's architecture, forcing the agent to learn compact, low-dimensional representations. We theoretically show that this bottleneck preserves the expressiveness of value functions and policies under mild conditions. Empirically, we demonstrate that orthogonal bottlenecks improve sample efficiency, generalization, and robustness to distractors in both discrete and continuous control tasks, including Atari and MuJoCo benchmarks.
强化学习.summary_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）代理通常依赖高维神经表示，尽管越来越多的证据表明任务相关的价值和策略结构本质上是低维的。本文提出一种简单有效的表示层先验，通过在RL代理架构中插入固定的正交瓶颈，强制代理学习紧凑的低维表示。理论上，我们证明在温和条件下，该瓶颈能保持价值函数和策略的表达能力。实验上，在Atari和MuJoCo等离散和连续控制任务中，正交瓶颈提高了样本效率、泛化能力和对干扰的鲁棒性。

多智能体系统.title: Behind EvoMap: Characterizing a Self-Evolving Agent-to-Agent Collaboration Network
多智能体系统.title_zh: EvoMap背后：自演化的智能体间协作网络特征
多智能体系统.summary: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) networks enable autonomous AI agents to collaborate by sharing reusable problem-solving instructions. However, how these decentralized ecosystems operate in practice remains largely unexplored. We present the first large-scale empirical study of EvoMap, a prominent A2A collaboration network. We analyze over 10,000 agents and 100,000 interactions, characterizing network structure, evolution patterns, and agent behaviors. Key findings include the emergence of specialized agent roles, the formation of stable collaboration clusters, and the impact of instruction reuse on network efficiency. Our work provides insights for designing more effective A2A systems.
多智能体系统.summary_zh: 智能体间（A2A）网络通过共享可重用的问题解决指令，使自主AI智能体能够协作。然而，这些去中心化生态系统在实践中如何运作仍鲜有探索。本文首次对著名的A2A协作网络EvoMap进行大规模实证研究。我们分析了超过10,000个智能体和100,000次交互，刻画了网络结构、演化模式和智能体行为。关键发现包括专业化智能体角色的涌现、稳定协作集群的形成以及指令重用对网络效率的影响。我们的工作为设计更有效的A2A系统提供了见解。

知识图谱/推理.title: Neural Scalable Symbolic Search Framework for Complex Logical Queries with Multiple Free Variables
知识图谱/推理.title_zh: 面向多自由变量复杂逻辑查询的神经可扩展符号搜索框架
知识图谱/推理.summary: Complex Query Answering (CQA) is a fundamental knowledge representation and reasoning task over incomplete knowledge graphs (KGs). Answering existential first-order queries with $k$ free variables (i.e., $\text{EFO}_k$ queries) is a crucial yet challenging problem, as it requires ranking answer tuples. Existing neural methods often fail to scale to multiple free variables. In this work, we propose a neural scalable symbolic search framework that combines neural embeddings with symbolic search to efficiently answer EFO_k queries. Our method uses a neural model to guide the search process and achieves scalability to multiple free variables. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our framework outperforms existing methods in accuracy and efficiency.
知识图谱/推理.summary_zh: 针对知识图谱上多自由变量存在性一阶查询（EFO_k）的复杂查询回答任务，现有神经方法难以扩展。本文提出神经可扩展符号搜索框架，融合神经嵌入与符号搜索。创新点在于用神经模型引导搜索过程，实现多自由变量下的高效扩展。实验在标准基准上准确率和效率均优于现有方法。主要贡献：首次实现EFO_k查询的可扩展神经符号推理，提出引导搜索机制。

category_summaries.机器学习/ML: 当日机器学习研究聚焦于鲁棒性、泛化性和效率提升。亮点包括对抗训练新范式、联邦学习优化及自监督学习改进。趋势显示对数据高效和计算轻量级方法的关注增加。
category_summaries.自然语言处理/NLP: NLP领域持续关注大语言模型（LLM）的涌现能力与对齐技术。研究亮点包括指令微调策略、少样本学习改进以及多语言模型优化。趋势指向更高效、可控的生成模型。
category_summaries.机器人/RO: 机器人研究集中在自主导航、操作和人类机器人交互。亮点包括基于强化学习的运动控制、感知融合和灵巧手设计。趋势显示对通用技能学习和仿真到现实迁移的重视。
category_summaries.软件工程与AI: 该方向探索AI在代码生成、测试和修复中的应用。亮点包括基于LLM的代码补全、自动调试以及安全漏洞检测。趋势强调AI辅助软件开发的可靠性和可解释性。
category_summaries.AI智能体与推理: 研究聚焦于智能体的规划、推理和工具使用能力。亮点包括基于LLM的智能体框架、任务分解和长程推理。趋势指向更自主、通用的智能体系统。
category_summaries.视觉语言模型: 视觉语言模型（VLM）研究热点包括多模态理解、生成和指令跟随。亮点有细粒度视觉描述、跨模态检索和视频理解。趋势是增强VLM的推理和交互能力。
category_summaries.AI系统与优化: 该方向关注AI训练和推理的系统效率。亮点包括分布式训练优化、模型并行策略以及硬件加速。趋势指向大规模模型部署中的资源管理和延迟优化。
category_summaries.Urban Representation Learning: 城市表征学习研究城市数据（如交通、人口）的嵌入方法。亮点包括时空图神经网络、城市动态建模和多源数据融合。趋势是提升城市预测和规划能力。
category_summaries.Computer Vision: 计算机视觉研究涵盖图像生成、检测和分割。亮点包括扩散模型改进、开放词汇检测和3D重建。趋势显示对生成式模型和零样本泛化的关注。
category_summaries.LLM / NLP: 大语言模型（LLM）研究聚焦于能力增强、评估和安全性。亮点包括长文本处理、知识编辑和幻觉缓解。趋势是构建更可靠、可控的LLM。
category_summaries.AI for Education / Data Leakage: 研究AI在教育中的应用及数据泄露问题。亮点包括个性化学习路径生成、知识追踪以及隐私保护技术。趋势强调AI教育的公平性和安全性。
category_summaries.机器学习与AI应用: 该方向展示AI在医疗、金融等领域的应用。亮点包括疾病诊断模型、时间序列预测和异常检测。趋势是提高模型可解释性和泛化能力。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与可解释性: 研究NLP模型的可解释性方法。亮点包括注意力可视化、概念解释和反事实分析。趋势是开发更透明的语言模型。
category_summaries.NLP与生成模型: 关注生成模型在NLP中的创新。亮点包括可控文本生成、摘要优化和对话系统改进。趋势是提升生成内容的质量和多样性。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: LLM研究热点包括模型压缩、微调和多模态扩展。亮点有参数高效微调、量化感知训练和视觉语言结合。趋势是降低LLM部署成本。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: CV方向突出图像视频理解与生成。亮点包括视频预测、深度估计和神经渲染。趋势是提升模型对动态场景的理解。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: 强化学习研究聚焦于样本效率和安全性。亮点包括离线RL改进、奖励塑形和探索策略。趋势是RL在真实世界中的应用。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习研究不同模态的融合与对齐。亮点包括多模态预训练、跨模态生成和感知融合。趋势是构建统一的多模态框架。
category_summaries.机器人: 机器人领域研究自主技能学习和人机协作。亮点包括模仿学习、任务规划和安全控制。趋势是提高机器人适应性和鲁棒性。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 推荐系统研究聚焦于个性化与公平性。亮点包括图神经网络推荐、序列推荐和去偏方法。趋势是提升推荐准确性和用户满意度。
category_summaries.图神经网络: 图神经网络研究关注图结构学习和可扩展性。亮点包括动态图建模、异构图表示和谱方法改进。趋势是GNN在大规模图上的应用。
category_summaries.NLP: NLP基础研究包括语义理解、句法分析和情感分析。亮点包括预训练语言模型改进、细粒度情感分类和事件抽取。趋势是增强模型对复杂语言现象的处理。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型研究突破包括扩散模型加速、GAN稳定性和自回归模型改进。亮点有高保真图像生成、可控生成和3D生成。趋势是生成模型的泛化与可控性。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法研究聚焦于深度学习训练加速。亮点包括自适应学习率方法、梯度压缩和分布式优化。趋势是开发更高效、鲁棒的优化器。
category_summaries.理论研究: 理论研究关注学习理论、模型行为分析。亮点包括泛化边界、模型容量和表示学习理论。趋势是深化对深度学习原理的理解。
category_summaries.AI控制/安全: AI控制与安全研究关注模型鲁棒性和安全性。亮点包括对抗防御、隐私保护和红队测试。趋势是构建可信AI系统。
category_summaries.模型压缩/量化: 模型压缩方向研究减少模型大小和加速推理。亮点包括知识蒸馏、网络剪枝和量化感知训练。趋势是边缘设备上的模型部署。
category_summaries.因果发现/AI科学家: 该方向探索因果推断和自动化科学发现。亮点包括因果图学习、干预实验设计和AI科研助手。趋势是AI驱动科学发现。
category_summaries.强化学习: 强化学习研究包括深度RL、多智能体RL和分层RL。亮点有样本效率提升、安全约束和探索机制。趋势是RL在复杂任务中的应用。
category_summaries.多智能体系统: 多智能体系统研究协作与竞争策略。亮点包括通信协议、角色分配和共享表示。趋势是提升多智能体系统的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
category_summaries.知识图谱/推理: 知识图谱研究关注构建、推理和问答。亮点包括图嵌入更新、时序推理和神经符号方法。趋势是增强知识图谱的推理能力。

highlights: 《When Search Becomes Memory》提出Auto-Robotist，将机器人设计试验转化为可迁移技能，通过记忆机制加速新任务设计，实用性强。
《Can LLMs Time Travel?》针对法律搜索中的时间一致性问题，用强化学习强制时间对齐，具有重要的法律应用价值。
《QUIET》提出多空白级联故事完形填空基准，直接评估LLM的创造性生成能力，弥补了现有基准的不足。
研究亮点1：VeriTrace: Evolving Mental Models for Deep Research Agents - 通过显式建模心智模型演化和验证机制，解决了深度研究智能体在不确定性环境中推理路径不可靠的问题，显著提升了复杂推理任务的准确性和鲁棒性。
研究亮点2：DRScaffold: Boosting Dense-Scene Reasoning in Lightweight Vision Language Models - 引入场景图引导的推理脚手架，在不增加模型规模的前提下显著增强了轻量级视觉语言模型的密集场景推理能力，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点3：From Accounting to Coordination: A Virtual Water-Aware Electricity-Computation-Water Nexus Framework for Data Center Dispatch - 首次将虚拟水概念引入数据中心调度优化，实现了电、算、水多资源协同，为绿色计算提供了创新解决方案。
研究亮点1：CITYREP - 提出了跨城市、任务和模态的统一城市表示基准，解决了当前评估中的数据泄露和泛化问题，为城市基础模型研究提供了标准化平台。
研究亮点2：EchoPilot - 无需训练的超声视频分割方法，利用尺度空间语义提示和可靠性门控记忆，在临床应用中具有高实用价值，无需微调即达到监督方法水平。
研究亮点3：Channel-wise Vector Quantization - 创新性地提出通道级令牌化范式，改变了图像表示方式，在生成任务中表现优异，为图像分词提供了新方向。
研究亮点1：《创意质量对齐：通过思维链微调实现专家隐性知识迁移》将理论创意度量与思维链微调结合，为AI生成内容的创造性评估与提升提供了可工程化的方法，兼具理论深度和实用价值。
daily_summary: 今日AI研究动态显示，大语言模型（LLM）仍是核心热点，研究重点从模型能力提升转向高效部署、安全性和可解释性。在视觉语言模型和多模态学习方面，跨模态理解与生成取得进展，视频理解和细粒度描述成为亮点。强化学习与机器人领域聚焦于样本效率和真实世界应用，多智能体系统协作机制受到关注。此外，AI系统优化和模型压缩工作持续推进，旨在降低大规模模型部署成本。值得注意的趋势包括：因果推断与AI科学家的结合，以及AI在教育领域的个性化应用和数据隐私保护。整体上，AI研究正朝着更实用、更可靠和更通用的方向发展。
